children.heading: Term of loan
children.label: a Term of loan
children.text: In the case of each loan commodity (other than upland cotton or extra long staple cotton), a marketing assistance loan under shall have a term of 9 months beginning on the first day of the first month after the month in which the loan is made.section 7231 of this title

children.heading: Special rule for cotton
children.label: b Special rule for cotton
children.text: A marketing assistance loan for upland cotton or extra long staple cotton shall have a term of 10 months beginning on the first day of the month in which the loan is made.

children.heading: Extensions prohibited
children.label: c Extensions prohibited
children.text: The Secretary may not extend the term of a marketing assistance loan for any loan commodity.
